stocks.impact_theory: Marvell reported Q4 FY2026 earnings beating estimates with 42% revenue growth driven by AI data center demand. Economic implications include sustained semi demand despite macro slowdown from weak jobs data. Market psychology: AI hype overrides broader selloff from geopolitics/oil spike. Historical parallels: Similar to NVDA post-earnings rallies in 2023-24. Analogies: Lone lighthouse in stormy seas; Ferrari on a highway of sedans.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Strong earnings beat, upbeat AI guidance, analyst upgrades (Benchmark to Buy, UBS PT $120). Positive X sentiment on AI strength, web news highlights premarket surge.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +15-20% gains on continued AI momentum, target $95-100.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky amid upgrades, potential -5% if market dumps semis.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Broader chip sector weakness from tariffs/geopolitics, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Clear earnings catalyst, strong analyst/X support, aligns with AI mega-trend.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4 revenue $444M beat (vs $422M est), 28% YoY growth from fleet telematics. Implications: Enterprise IoT resilient in economic uncertainty. Psychology: Growth stock relief rally amid rate cut hopes. Parallels: Similar beats by CRM in past cycles. Analogies: Steady climber up Everest while others slip; coffee boost in sleepy market.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat, raised guidance. Premarket up 9%, positive mentions in CNBC movers, X buzz on volume surge.

stocks.justification: Solid beat but less hype than semis; good but not A-tier.

stocks.impact_theory: Up 37% on DOJ legal opinion boosting California pipeline hopes + oil spike from Iran tensions. Implications: Higher energy prices support E&P profitability. Psychology: FOMO on small-cap oil amid geopolitics. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine oil surge. Analogies: Wildfire in dry forest; dam breaking flood of buys.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Pipeline news + macro oil rally, top gainer lists, high X engagement.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +25% to $17, oil above $90 catalyst.

stocks.justification: Strong move but volatile small-cap, geo risk.

stocks.impact_theory: Premarket gainer +35% on oil surge from geopolitical risks (Iran conflict escalation). Implications: Short-term energy inflation hedge. Psychology: Panic buying oil amid stock selloff. Parallels: Oct 2023 Hamas oil pops. Analogies: Shark in bloodied waters; lottery ticket in bear market.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Top premarket gainer, oil ETF USO +8%, X most watched.

stocks.impact_theory: Stock drops on tariff threats from Trump admin impacting imports, despite sales growth outlook 2-3%. Implications: Retail margins squeeze. Psychology: Risk-off on consumer discretionary amid macro fears. Parallels: 2018 tariff war hits. Analogies: Anchor in rising tide; speed bump on recovery road.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: CEO flags tariffs, CNBC premarket mover down, broader retail weakness.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long dip buy if tariffs mild, +10%.

stocks.justification: Credible tariff risk, but sales growth supportive.
